title: CMMC Shield — AI Compliance Copilot for Small Defense Contractors

summary.problem: CMMC 2.0 Level 2 becomes mandatory for all new DoD contracts by Oct 31, 2026. Only 0.5% of DIB is certified. Small contractors face $75K-$130K first-year costs and can't afford consultants or enterprise platforms.
summary.solution: AI-powered CMMC compliance navigator: automated gap assessment, SSP generation, POA&M creation, C3PAO readiness scoring, remediation tracking. Web-based, $99-$299/mo.
summary.audience: Small defense contractors (1-50 employees) in the U.S. Defense Industrial Base (~200,000 companies)
